stereotype: «Engine» — Settlement-terms volatility: RevenueShareTerm + ComputeCostPricing + SettlementSchedule + BillingTerms
volatility: Settlement-terms volatility — how the signed net for a customer's cycle is computed from inbound revenue and compute usage, and which way (Payout vs Shortfall charge) it routes. Revenue share (launch 10%, per-customer/per-time variation), compute-cost pass-through, schedule cadence, and shortfall-billing policy all evolve behind this Engine as package-internal Strategy.

ops.signature: computeNet(revenue CycleRevenue, usage CycleUsage, terms SettlementTerms) → SettlementResult
ops.stereotype: pure compute — plain deterministic Go function, no Temporal
ops.note: Computes the signed net (inbound revenue − revenue share − compute cost) and routing directive (Payout/Charge/NoAction) for a closed billing cycle.

fields.name: Revenue
fields.note: Value snapshot from revenueLedgerAccess.readRange passed in by settlementManager

fields.name: Usage
fields.note: Value snapshot from usageAccess.readRange passed in by settlementManager

fields.name: Terms
fields.note: Customer's settlement-terms snapshot from settlementStateAccess; carries RevenueShareTerm, ComputeCostPricing, SettlementSchedule, BillingTerms Strategies

fields.name: SignedNet
fields.note: Positive == Payout to customer; negative == Shortfall charge

fields.name: RoutingDirective
fields.note: RoutingPayout | RoutingCharge | RoutingNoAction — stated, not performed

fields.name: RevenueShareApplied
fields.note: The cut taken; for the settlement statement

fields.name: ComputeCostApplied
fields.note: The pass-through applied; for the settlement statement

fields.name: (error)
fields.note: Method layer-typed error — ContractMisuse | UnknownTerms | InternalInvariant (programmer errors only; no retryable flag)

ops.stereotype: pure compute — plain deterministic Go function, no Temporal
ops.note: Recomputes the corrected signed net and delta routing directive for a cycle after a chargeback reversal; forward-only compensation.

fields.name: AffectedCycle
fields.note: Carries reversal-adjusted Revenue, Usage, Terms, and PriorSettled SettlementResult; Manager has already appended the reversal and re-read the range

fields.name: SignedNet
fields.note: Corrected signed net after chargeback reversal

fields.name: RoutingDirective
fields.note: Delta routing directive (re-charge/re-payout of the difference vs prior settlement); forward-only

fields.name: (error)
fields.note: Method layer-typed error — ContractMisuse | UnknownTerms | InternalInvariant

ops.stereotype: pure compute — plain deterministic Go function, no Temporal
ops.note: Projects the revenue-share and compute-cost terms implied by the committed project option for the SDP confirmation row; no actuals exist at commit time.

fields.name: Option
fields.note: Carries SettlementTerms by value per D-OE OQ-2/FU-OE-A precedent; same option constructionEstimationEngine and operationEstimationEngine receive

fields.name: RevenueShareProjection
fields.note: What aiarch's cut policy implies for this option (Kind + projected rate/regime summary)

fields.name: ComputeCostProjection
fields.note: What the compute-cost-pricing policy implies for this option

fields.name: (error)
fields.note: Method layer-typed error — ContractMisuse | UnknownTerms | InternalInvariant

dataContracts: CycleRevenue = { CustomerID; CycleID; GrossInbound Money; Currency string; EventCount int } // value snapshot passed by Manager from revenueLedgerAccess.readRange
CycleUsage = { CustomerID; CycleID; ComputeUnitSeconds float64; StorageBytesMonths float64; EgressBytes float64 } // from usageAccess.readRange
SettlementTerms = { RevenueShareTerm; ComputeCostPricing; SettlementSchedule; BillingTerms } // from settlementStateAccess
ReSettlementInput = { Revenue CycleRevenue; Usage CycleUsage; Terms SettlementTerms; PriorSettled SettlementResult }
ProjectOption = { OptionID; Terms SettlementTerms; ... } // carries settlement terms on option (D-OE OQ-2/FU-OE-A precedent)
SettlementResult = { SignedNet Money; RoutingDirective RoutingDirective; RevenueShareApplied Money; ComputeCostApplied Money }
Money = { MinorUnits int64; Currency string } // canonical in framework-go; integer minor-units, no float
fweng.Error = { Kind: ContractMisuse | UnknownTerms | InternalInvariant } // all programmer errors; no retryable flag; no Temporal
errorModel: framework-go/engine.Error — kinds: ContractMisuse (nil input or structurally invalid — Manager bug), UnknownTerms (unregistered Strategy — deploy/config bug; never silent fallback on real money), InternalInvariant (engine-internal violation — panics in test). No retryable flag and no Temporal mapping — pure Engine, direct in-workflow call.
idempotency: Trivially idempotent — pure deterministic functions. Identical inputs → identical output always. No idempotencyKey parameter. Settlement mutations are deduped by the Manager's settleCycle/resettleCycle Activity, not here.

revisions.summary: Initial contract — three ops (computeNet, recomputeNet, projectCommitTimeRevenueShareAndComputeCost). Settlement twin of constructionEstimationEngine/operationEstimationEngine. No outbound edge. Pure/deterministic/no-Temporal. 9/9 App C §6 self-check PASS, 0 waivers.

APPROVED — FROZEN. 9/9 PASS independently re-walked. Two callers / three ops / zero outbound edges confirmed from DSL. OQ-1..OQ-7 adjudicated. One freeze-time amendment: Money canonical location pinned to framework-go (OQ-6). Four non-blocking follow-ups routed to C-SG.
